item.title: Why the outer solar system is filled with giant cosmic “snowmen”
item.description: Far beyond Neptune, in the frozen depths of the Kuiper Belt, many ancient objects oddly resemble giant snowmen made of ice and rock. For years, scient...

item.title: Cleaner wrasse show self awareness in stunning mirror experiments
item.description: Cleaner wrasse have revealed a remarkable new side of fish intelligence. Marked with fake parasites, they used mirrors to inspect and remove the spots...

item.title: Young Mars volcano hides a powerful magma engine beneath the surface
item.description: A Martian volcano once thought to be the result of a single eruption turns out to have a much more complex past. Orbital imaging and mineral data show...

item.title: A giant blade-crested spinosaurus, the “hell heron,” discovered in the Sahara
item.description: Deep in the heart of the Sahara, scientists have uncovered Spinosaurus mirabilis — a spectacular new predator crowned with a massive, scimitar-shaped ...

item.title: Triceratops had a giant nose that may have cooled its massive head
item.description: Triceratops’ massive head may have been doing more than just showing off those famous horns. Using CT scans and 3D reconstructions of fossil skulls, r...
